channel.title: GitHub HCL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: ChristianLempa/boilerplates
item.description: This is my personal template collection. Here you'll find templates, and configurations for various tools, and technologies.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-alb-service-task
item.description: Terraform module which implements an ECS service which exposes a web service via ALB.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
item.description: Terraform module to provision Auto Scaling Group and Launch Template on AWS

item.title: semgrep/semgrep-rules
item.description: Semgrep Community Edition rules, maintained by Semgrep and the community. Free to use under the Semgrep Rules License.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-alb
item.description: Terraform module to provision a standard ALB for HTTP/HTTP traffic
